title: 3 Nights London Private.

private.name: Private Exclusive Coach
private.blurb: Private vehicle transfers and touring with a driver throughout your London stay.

transport.1: London airport to London hotel private transfer.
transport.2: London city tour, 3 hrs with guide, by private vehicle.
transport.3: Stonehenge and Bath excursion by private coach, including entrance tickets.
transport.4: London hotel to London airport private transfer.

inclusions: London airport to hotel private transfer on arrival
London city tour, 3 hrs with private guide
Stonehenge and Bath excursion with entrance tickets
Private coach on disposal for 2 days (Day 2–3)
London hotel to airport private transfer on departure

days.title: Arrive London
days.desc: Arrive into London and transfer privately to your central hotel. The rest of the day is free to explore nearby — Westminster, the South Bank and Victoria are all within easy reach on foot or by a short taxi ride.

days.title: London city tour
days.desc: A guided city tour takes in London's icons: Buckingham Palace, Westminster Abbey, Big Ben and the Houses of Parliament, followed by free time for the London Eye and a Thames river cruise past St Paul's Cathedral and Tower Bridge.
days.experience: Ride the London Eye for sweeping views over the Thames and the Palace of Westminster.
days.shopping: Oxford Street and Regent Street, London's flagship shopping mile, are a short ride from the hotel.

days.title: Stonehenge & Bath excursion
days.desc: A full-day excursion out of the city to Stonehenge, the prehistoric stone circle on Salisbury Plain, followed by the Georgian city of Bath with its Roman Baths and honey-coloured crescents.
days.taste: Sample a traditional Bath bun or afternoon tea in one of Bath's historic tearooms near the Abbey.

days.title: Depart London
days.desc: Free time until your private transfer to London airport, depending on flight time.

about.title: Best season
about.body: April–September for mild weather and long daylight hours; December is festive but cold.

about.title: Weather
about.body: Mild and changeable year-round, typically 8–22°C — a light rain layer is useful in any season.

about.title: Currency & docs
about.body: Pound sterling (£). The United Kingdom is outside the Schengen area, so a separate passport check applies on arrival.

goodToKnow.title: Tickets & timing
goodToKnow.body: Book London Eye and Thames river cruise slots in advance in peak summer months; Stonehenge is quietest earlier in the day.

goodToKnow.title: Your vehicle
goodToKnow.body: Driver working hours are limited to 10 hrs per day by law — the Stonehenge and Bath day is planned around this.

goodToKnow.title: What to pack
goodToKnow.body: Comfortable walking shoes and a waterproof layer; London's pavements and cobbled areas see a lot of walking.

goodToKnow.title: Money
goodToKnow.body: Cards are accepted almost everywhere in London; contactless is standard. Tipping around 10-12.5% in restaurants is customary.

goodToKnow.title: Getting around
goodToKnow.body: Central London hotels put Westminster, the South Bank and the West End within easy walking or short taxi distance.

terms: All rates are net and per person for the package.
Child rates apply for children aged 2 to 11 years old. One child sharing a room with 2 adults, subject to hotel policy.
All rates are subject to availability at the time of booking. Europe Incoming will endeavour to match the rates quoted.
Rates are not applicable during trade fair periods, major European public holidays, and other major events.
City taxes are not included in the price.
If certain attractions are closed during specific periods, alternative options will be arranged.
All bookings must be confirmed at least 60 working days prior to arrival.
100% pre-payment required by bank transfer or credit card (Visa or Mastercard). All bank transfer charges covered by the Agent.
Vouchers will be issued after receipt of full payment.
